title: 39 - Talking About Your Day
description: گفتگوی زن و شوهر درباره اینکه روزشان چطور گذشت.

sentences.text: It was long and busy. I'm tired.
Did you have a lot of work?
Yes, and a long meeting after lunch.
sentences.translation: بله، و یک جلسه طولانی بعد از ناهار.

sentences.text: You're home now. You need to rest.
What about you? How was your day?
It was good. I finished early.
sentences.translation: خوب بود. زود کارم تمام شد.

sentences.text: Wonderful. Can we watch a movie this evening?
Yes, but let's go to bed early.
Good idea. I really need to sleep.
sentences.translation: فکر خوبی است. واقعاً به خواب نیاز دارم.
